system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_baogia_sanpham_tudong","body":"
CREATE   PROC TR_BAOGIA_SANPHAM_TUDONG
(
	@masp nvarchar(200),
	@tygia_usd float
)
AS
BEGIN
	--DECLARE @tygia_usd float = 25400
	--DECLARE @masp nvarchar(200) = '2511-0237Z_2511_BST'

	IF @tygia_usd IS NULL OR @tygia_usd <= 0
		SET @tygia_usd = 1

	DECLARE @baoGiaID uniqueidentifier
	DECLARE @tensp nvarchar(max)
	DECLARE @mausac nvarchar(50)
	DECLARE @ketcau nvarchar(50)
	DECLARE @bemat_sanpham nvarchar(50)
	DECLARE @dai float
	DECLARE @rong float
	DECLARE @cao float
	DECLARE @quycach_carton nvarchar(max)
	DECLARE @tong_cbm float
	DECLARE @somam float
	DECLARE @sotien_mam float
	DECLARE @dongia_son float

	DECLARE @TONG_THANHPHAM TABLE
	(
		tenchiphi nvarchar(200),
		dongia float,
		soluong float,
		thanhtien_vnd float,
		tygia int,
		phantram nvarchar(50),
		nhom nvarchar(100)
	)

	--INSERT INTO @TONG_THANHPHAM(tenchiphi, dongia, soluong, thanhtien_vnd, tygia, phantram, nhom)

	DECLARE @isKD bit
	SET @isKD = 0

	SELECT @baoGiaID = NEWID(),
		@tensp = tensp, 
		@mausac = mausac,
		@ketcau = ketcau, 
		@bemat_sanpham = bemat_sanpham, 
		@dai = dai, 
		@rong = rong, 
		@cao = cao, 
		@quycach_carton = quycach_carton,
		@tong_cbm = cbm, 
		@somam = heso_mam, 
		@sotien_mam = dongia_mam,
		@dongia_son = dongia_son
	FROM tr_sanpham WITH(NOLOCK)
	WHERE masp = @masp

	IF @ketcau = N'Ráp chết'
		SET @isKD = 0
	ELSE
		SET @isKD = 1

	-- 1. TÍNH GIÁ GỖ VÁN #DINHMUC_GOVAN
	SELECT A.stt, A.chitiet, A.nguyenlieu,
		A.veneer_matchinh, A.veneer_matphu, A.veneer_dan_canh,
		A.uv_matchinh, A.uv_matphu, A.uv_canhngan, A.uv_canhdai,
		A.dayy_tc, A.rong_tc, A.dai_tc, A.soluong_tc,
		mong = A.mong1 + A.mong2,
		m3 = (A.dayy_tc * A.rong_tc * A.dai_tc * A.soluong_tc) / 1000000000,
		dientich = ((A.dai_tc * A.rong_tc * 2) + (A.dai_tc * A.dayy_tc * 2) + (A.dayy_tc * A.rong_tc*2) * A.soluong_tc) / 1000000,
		dongia_son = @dongia_son,
		0 AS dongia_nguyenlieu,
		0 AS thanhtien_govan,
		0 AS thanhtien_veneer,
		A.ghichu, A.mact, A.masp
	INTO #DINHMUC_GOVAN
	FROM tr_dinhmuc_govan A
	WHERE A.masp = @masp AND A.mact <> '000'
	ORDER BY A.stt

	DECLARE CUR CURSOR LOCAL FOR
		SELECT mact, nguyenlieu,
			dayy_tc, rong_tc, dai_tc, soluong_tc, m3,
			veneer_matchinh, veneer_matphu, veneer_dan_canh
		FROM #DINHMUC_GOVAN
	OPEN CUR
	DECLARE @mact nvarchar(50), @nguyenlieu nvarchar(200)
	DECLARE @dayy_tc float, @rong_tc float, @dai_tc float, @soluong_tc int, @m3 float
	DECLARE @veneer_matchinh int, @veneer_matphu int, @veneer_dan_canh int
		FETCH NEXT FROM CUR INTO @mact, @nguyenlieu, @dayy_tc, @rong_tc, @dai_tc, @soluong_tc, @m3, @veneer_matchinh, @veneer_matphu, @veneer_dan_canh
	WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
	BEGIN
		DECLARE @dongia_nguyenlieu float--, @thanhtien_govan float
		DECLARE @loaitien nvarchar(10)

		-- SET @thanhtien_govan = 0;
		SET @dongia_nguyenlieu = 0;
		SET @loaitien = 'VND'

		SELECT @dongia_nguyenlieu = dongia, @loaitien = loaitien
		FROM tr_baogia_chiphi_nguyenlieu
		WHERE nguyenlieu = @nguyenlieu

		IF @dongia_nguyenlieu IS NULL
			SET @dongia_nguyenlieu = 0
		ELSE
		BEGIN
			IF @loaitien = 'USD'
				SET @dongia_nguyenlieu = @dongia_nguyenlieu * @tygia_usd
		END

		UPDATE #DINHMUC_GOVAN
		SET dongia_nguyenlieu = @dongia_nguyenlieu,
			thanhtien_govan = @dongia_nguyenlieu * @m3
		WHERE mact = @mact AND masp = @masp
	
		IF @nguyenlieu IN ('MDF', 'LVB', 'PLYWOOD', N'VÁN ÉP', 'PB', 'LVL', 'LVD')
		BEGIN
			INSERT INTO @TONG_THANHPHAM(tenchiphi, dongia, soluong, thanhtien_vnd, tygia, phantram, nhom)
			VALUES (CONCAT(@nguyenlieu, ' ', @dayy_tc, 'mm'), @dongia_nguyenlieu, @m3, @dongia_nguyenlieu * @m3, @tygia_usd, 0, N'Gỗ ván')
		END
		ELSE
		BEGIN
			INSERT INTO @TONG_THANHPHAM(tenchiphi, dongia, soluong, thanhtien_vnd, tygia, phantram, nhom)
			VALUES (@nguyenlieu, @dongia_nguyenlieu, @m3, @dongia_nguyenlieu * @m3, @tygia_usd, 0, N'Gỗ ván')
		END
		-- TÍNH GIÁ VENEER
		IF @dai_tc > 0
		BEGIN
			DECLARE @dongia1 float, @dongia2 float, @dongia3 float;
			DECLARE @thanhtien_veneer1 float, @thanhtien_veneer2 float, @thanhtien_veneer3 float;
			DECLARE @tenveneer1 nvarchar(200), @tenveneer2 nvarchar(200), @tenveneer3 nvarchar(200);
		
			SET @dongia1 = 0
			SET @dongia2 = 0
			SET @dongia3 = 0

			SET @thanhtien_veneer1 = 0
			SET @thanhtien_veneer2 = 0
			SET @thanhtien_veneer3 = 0

			SET @tenveneer1 = ''
			SET @tenveneer2 = ''
			SET @tenveneer3 = ''

			SELECT @dongia1 = CASE WHEN @dai_tc >= 2000 THEN dongia2 ELSE dongia1 END, @tenveneer1 = loaihang
			FROM tr_baogia_chiphi_veneer
			WHERE id = @veneer_matchinh

			SELECT @dongia2 = CASE WHEN @dai_tc >= 2000 THEN dongia2 ELSE dongia1 END, @tenveneer2 = loaihang
			FROM tr_baogia_chiphi_veneer
			WHERE id = @veneer_matphu

			SELECT @dongia3 = CASE WHEN @dai_tc >= 2000 THEN dongia2 ELSE dongia1 END, @tenveneer3 = loaihang
			FROM tr_baogia_chiphi_veneer
			WHERE id = @veneer_dan_canh

			IF @dongia1 IS NULL
			BEGIN
				SET @dongia1 = 0
			END

			IF @dongia2 IS NULL
			BEGIN
				SET @dongia2 = 0
			END

			IF @dongia3 IS NULL
			BEGIN
				SET @dongia3 = 0
			END

			DECLARE @m2 float;
		
			IF @dongia1 > 0
			BEGIN
				IF @nguyenlieu NOT IN ('', '0')
				BEGIN
					SET @m2 = 0
					SET @m2 = (@rong_tc * @dai_tc * @soluong_tc)/1000000;
					SET @thanhtien_veneer1 = @dongia1 * @m2

					INSERT INTO @TONG_THANHPHAM(tenchiphi, dongia, soluong, thanhtien_vnd, tygia, phantram, nhom)
					VALUES (@tenveneer1, @dongia1, @m2, @thanhtien_veneer1, @tygia_usd, 0, N'Gỗ ván')
				END
			END
			IF @dongia2 > 0
			BEGIN
				IF @nguyenlieu NOT IN ('', '0')
				BEGIN
					SET @m2 = 0
					SET @m2 = (@rong_tc * @dai_tc * @soluong_tc)/1000000;
					SET @thanhtien_veneer2 = @dongia2 * @m2

					INSERT INTO @TONG_THANHPHAM(tenchiphi, dongia, soluong, thanhtien_vnd, tygia, phantram, nhom)
					VALUES (@tenveneer2, @dongia2, @m2, @thanhtien_veneer2, @tygia_usd, 0, N'Gỗ ván')
				END
			END
-- ... (truncated)","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.cur","dbo.tr_baogia_chiphi_nguyenlieu","dbo.tr_baogia_chiphi_other","dbo.tr_baogia_chiphi_veneer","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_material","dbo.tr_sanpham"],"writesTables":["dbo.tr_baogia2_danhsach","dbo.tr_baogia_donggoi","dbo.tr_baogia_govan","dbo.tr_baogia_ngukim","dbo.tr_baogia_other","dbo.tr_baogia_son","dbo.tr_baogia_thanhpham"],"flags":["has-transaction","has-try-catch","has-cursor","has-while","has-group-by","has-temp-table","writes-multi-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
